items.headline: Carrigg gives Rox 'a breath of fresh air' with 3rd HR since callup

news_items.headline: Tigers' Perez hurt when resistance band hits face
news_items.summary: Tigers outfielder Wenceel Perez was injured in a freak accident when he was hit in the the face by a resistance band in the training room following Tuesday's game against the Astros.

news_items.headline: Blue Jays put Scherzer on IL with back spasms
news_items.summary: The Blue Jays placed three-time Cy Young winner Max Scherzer on the 10-day injured list Wednesday with back spasms.

news_items.headline: Tigers' Verlander set for Comerica Park return Sun...
news_items.summary: Tigers right-hander Justin Verlander is expected to start against the White Sox on Sunday at Comerica Park, where he has not pitched for the franchise since 2017.

news_items.headline: Brunson, Hart toss first pitches at Yankee Stadium...
news_items.summary: Knicks stars Jalen Brunson and Josh Hart received loud ovations from fans at Yankee Stadium as they took the field to throw out the ceremonial first pitches before Wednesday's White Sox-Yankees game.

news_items.headline: Phils' Painter roughed up again, then sent down
news_items.summary: The Phillies optioned Andrew Painter to Triple A on Wednesday, a move that came after the young right-hander was roughed up in another start.

news_items.headline: Guardians OF DeLauter (rib) goes on injured list
news_items.summary: Cleveland OF Chase DeLauter was placed on the 10-day injured list on Wednesday because of a fractured rib on his right side, the team announced.

news_items.headline: ⚾ Tom Glavine fears another ugly work stoppage
news_items.summary: The union's primary spokesperson the last time baseball lost games to a labor fight sees similar signs of trouble ahead.

news_items.headline: Royals trade for RHP Randy Dobnak from Mariners
Diamondbacks Reacts Survey: The Boys are Back(ish) in Town
news_items.summary: Welcome to SB Nation Reacts, a survey of fans across the MLB. Throughout the year we ask questions of the most plugged-in Diamondbacks fans and fans across the country. Sign up here to participate in the weekly emailed surveys. At the start of the year, and through the early weeks of the season, it felt […]

news_items.headline: 4 takeaways from Rays vs. Dodgers: Shohei Ohtani's Cy Young chances, Kyle Tucker's slump, the Rays' power outage and more
news_items.summary: The Dodgers swept the three-game series between two of the best teams in baseball.

news_items.headline: Blue Jays place Max Scherzer on the 10-day injured list with back spasms
news_items.summary: Scherzer, who turns 42 next month, spent more than six weeks on the injured list this season with right forearm tendinitis and left ankle inflammation.
